member.name: T:structIQe_Common_Library.My.Resources.Resources
member.summary: A strongly-typed resource class, for looking up localized strings, etc.

member.name: P:structIQe_Common_Library.My.Resources.Resources.ResourceManager
member.summary: Returns the cached ResourceManager instance used by this class.

member.name: P:structIQe_Common_Library.My.Resources.Resources.Culture
member.summary: Overrides the current thread's CurrentUICulture property for all resource lookups using this strongly typed resource class.

member.name: M:structIQe_Common_Library.SupabaseHelper.PollMyPendingActionsAsync(System.Guid,System.Guid,System.Int32)
member.summary: Called by the desktop app on a timer. Returns all PENDING actions addressed to the current employee. RLS ensures only this employee's actions are returned.

member.name: M:structIQe_Common_Library.SupabaseHelper.GetMyRequestedActionsAsync(System.Guid,System.Guid,System.String)
member.summary: Used by the web/mobile UI to show the status of actions that the current user initiated for other employees.

member.name: M:structIQe_Common_Library.SupabaseHelper.EnqueueActionAsync(System.Guid,System.Guid,System.String,System.Object,System.Nullable{System.Guid})
M:structIQe_Common_Library.SupabaseHelper.MarkInProgressAsync(System.Guid)
member.summary: Call this immediately when the desktop picks up an action, before doing any real work. Prevents double-processing if the polling loop runs again before the action completes.

member.name: M:structIQe_Common_Library.SupabaseProjectGroups.GetProjectGroupsCacheAsync(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String},System.Boolean,System.Boolean,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Single-call replacement for BuildGroupsCacheFromSupabase. Company ID is auto-detected from JWT inside the RPC.

member.name: F:structIQe_Common_Library.User_Login.OutlookApp
member.summary: '''''' to ensure we can login multiple users in same session.
